text:
Most AI products should not start with automation.

They should start with deletion.

What step can disappear completely?

Not faster.
Not prettier.
Gone.

Example:
If a small business still has to copy supplier data into Excel after using your tool, you did not automate the
name: ⚡️Korba.tgn⚡️

text:

text: Most small business owners skip workflow automation thinking it's optional. Wrong move. 82% of small business employers have already invested in AI tools. The gap between you and them just became measurable. Get aligned on the problem first, then pick your stack.
name: siftydeals

text: AI automation gets real when a workflow stops being a chat and becomes an inspectable loop. For a small business, the value is not one more prompt. It is checkpoints, memory, validation, and clear handoff points so the agent can keep moving without creating hidden risk.
name: Sunrise Lee
